PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: dispatched hooks through the binrun wrapper with an async self-updater

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pool.summary: hard-cut the signed-holder runtime and sealed worker environments

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-present.summary: distributed via a binrun shim with a version-exact descriptor

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-runtime.summary: bound requests to daemon publications and hard-cut durable workers to daemonkit

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-steer.summary: hard-cut shadow state to cc-transcript's schema and pruned degenerate DPO pairs

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-transcript.summary: archived-and-continued on schema mismatch instead of failing closed

PushEvent:yasyf/experiment-at-home.summary: reaped completed child processes in the detach runtime

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: fenced mutation reservations at observer barriers and joined stopped children

PushEvent:yasyf/spawnllm.summary: switched to file-backed stdin so the payload is complete at exec

authkit@v0.2.0.summary: pinned cookiesync trust by its shipped module-path codesign identifier

captain-hook@v12.17.0.summary: dispatched hooks through a binrun wrapper with an async self-updater

cc-notes@v0.45.0.summary: adopted fenced signed-helper deployment and closed its CI contracts

cc-pool@v0.63.2.summary: kept the App Group identity signed-side and prevented unsigned leakage
